Class SplashScreenProperties

Provided properties which are required to show ISplashScreen.

Inheritance
object
SplashScreenProperties
Implements
ICloneable<SplashScreenProperties>
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)

object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public class SplashScreenProperties : ICloneable<SplashScreenProperties>

Constructors

SplashScreenProperties(string, string, int, int, string)

Initializes a new instance of the SplashScreenProperties class with a specified title, subtitle start year, end year, and company name.

Declaration
public SplashScreenProperties(string title, string subtitle, int startYear, int endYear, string companyName)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string title

Title for the splash screen.
string subtitle

Subtitle for the splash screen
int startYear

Start year used in copyright notice.
int endYear

End year used in copyright notice.
string companyName

Company name used in copyright notice.
Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentException

Thrown, if title or companyName is null, empty or whitespce. Or if startYear or endYear is less than 0 or greater than 9999.

Properties

ActiveGlowColor

Gets or sets the color of the glow effect for the splash screen displayed in the active state.

Declaration
public Color ActiveGlowColor { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
Color
Remarks

A splash screen can be displayed using the glow effect. This effect is enabled, when AllowGlowEffect property set to true.

AllowGlowEffect

Gets or sets whether the splash screen is displayed using the glow effect.

Declaration
public bool AllowGlowEffect { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

ClosingDelay

Gets or sets the delay, in milliseconds, before the splash screen is closed.

Declaration
public int ClosingDelay { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
int

Copyright

Gets the copyright notice.

Declaration
public string Copyright { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
string

InactiveGlowColor

Gets or sets the color of the glow effect for the splash screen displayed in the inactive state.

Declaration
public Color InactiveGlowColor { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
Color
Remarks

A splash screen can be displayed using the glow effect. This effect is enabled, when AllowGlowEffect property set to true.

IndicatorType

Gets or sets the loading indicator kind.

Declaration
public LoadingIndicatorType IndicatorType { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
LoadingIndicatorType

Logo

Gets or sets a raster logo image.

Declaration
public Image Logo { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
Image
Remarks

If SvgLogo is not set or not valid then only 'Logo' property is used, other wise SvgLogo is used for logo.

Opacity

Gets or sets the opacity level of the splashscreen’s background.

Declaration
public int Opacity { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
int
Remarks

The opacity level (between 0 and 255) of the splashscreen’s background.

OpacityColor

Gets or sets the background color.

Declaration
public Color OpacityColor { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
Color
Remarks

If this parameter is set to Color.Empty, the actual background color is Color.Black.

Status

Gets or sets the status.

Declaration
public string Status { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
string

Subtitle

Get the sub title for splash screen.

Declaration
public string Subtitle { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
string

SvgLogo

Gets or sets vector logo image.

Declaration
public ISVGImage SvgLogo { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
ISVGImage
Remarks

If 'SvgLogo' property is not set or not valid then only this Logo property is used, other wise SvgLogo is used for logo.

Title

Gets the title for splash screen.

Declaration
public string Title { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
string

UseFadeInEffect

Gets or sets whether to use a fade-in effect when a splash screen is being opened.

Declaration
public bool UseFadeInEffect { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

UseFadeOutEffect

Gets or sets whether to use a fade-out effect when a splash screen is being closed.

Declaration
public bool UseFadeOutEffect { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool
